Thanks for the PR! Before submitting:
1. Tests pass locally: `pnpm test`
2. Build passes locally: `pnpm build`
3. The Storybook builds: `pnpm build:storybook`
4. New components have entries in both fixture registries
   (packages/react/test-fixtures/fixtures.tsx and packages/svelte/test-fixtures/props.ts)
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Both React and Svelte equivalents updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies, or one is justified in the description
- [ ] No console errors / warnings in the dev dashboards or Storybooks
- [ ] Accessibility verified (keyboard nav + screen reader where applicable)
